title: LavaRising
description: A half decent Lava Rising plugin
body:
# A somewhat decent lava rising plugin

**This plugin requires GameMaster! Download it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamemaster)**

**Please check the usage instructions [here](https://github.com/DiffuseHyperion/LavaRising/wiki)!**

A plugin to easily host a lava rising minigame for your friends, with in-depth configuration and additional features for advanced server owners.


## Credits

Original idea by https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1n_PfsVqxllCcnMPlxBIjw

Idea for the different periods by plexion.dev, quite underrated

This is basically a port of plexion's lava rising datapack, with a bit more flexibility and additional features
